sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: TJX: Telsey Advisory Maintains Outperform Rating and $170 PT | T
feed.summary: Telsey Advisory Group has reaffirmed its "Outperform" rating for TJX Companies (TJX) with a steadfast price target of $170. This decision, led by analyst Dana Telsey, follows consistent positive ratings from other financial analysts for the off-price retail giant. While Wall Street analysts forecast an average upside of 5.70% from the current price, GuruFocus estimates a potential downside based on its GF Value fair value calculation.

feed.title: Altria Group (MO) Reaffirms 2026 Earnings Guidance
feed.summary: Altria Group (MO) has reaffirmed its 2026 adjusted diluted earnings per share forecast, projecting growth between $5.56 and $5.72, driven primarily by increased cigarette import and export activities in the latter half of the year. The company's guidance also factors in investments in contract manufacturing and regulatory enforcement impacts, while maintaining a leading position in the U.S. tobacco market with diversified interests. Despite a "modestly overvalued" valuation according to metrics, Altria exhibits strong financial health with robust margins and strategic investments.

feed.title: Commerz Real invests in ATC Europe telecom towers via Allianz partnership
feed.summary: Commerz Real has acquired a minority stake in ATC Europe, the European arm of American Tower Corporation, partnering with Allianz Global Investors. This investment marks the debut transaction for Commerz Real's new infrastructure fund, Infravest. Allianz remains an investor in ATC Europe, which operates over 30,000 towers in Germany, France, and Spain, characterized by stable, inflation-linked lease agreements.

feed.title: CraniUS Therapeutics Appoints Johnson & Johnson Senior Executive, Oray Boston Jr. to Board of Directors
feed.summary: CraniUS Therapeutics has appointed Oray Boston Jr., a former Johnson & Johnson senior executive with extensive global leadership experience in medical devices and pharmaceuticals, to its Board of Directors. Boston's expertise in commercialization, product launches, and international market expansion is expected to be invaluable as CraniUS Therapeutics advances its NeuroPASS™ platform, an investigational device for localized drug delivery to the brain, towards clinical and commercial milestones.

feed.title: Xcel Energy Crews Work To Restore Power In St. Cloud Area
feed.summary: Xcel Energy is working to restore power to approximately 4,500 customers in the St. Cloud metro area, specifically Waite Park and west St. Cloud, after an outage occurred around 6:15 a.m. The estimated restoration time is between 8:00 a.m. and 9:30 a.m. Crews are focused on safely and quickly returning electricity to affected homes and businesses.

feed.title: Buffett Dumps More Apple
feed.summary: Warren Buffett, in his last quarter as Berkshire Hathaway CEO, continued to trim his position in Apple, a trend he has maintained for several quarters. While Apple's stock has seen an 8% increase over the past year, it lags behind the S&P and Alphabet, and its iPhone sales remain 60% of its revenue. One likely reason for Buffett's divestment could be Apple's apparent lag in the AI race, relying on licensing Google Gemini for Siri instead of developing its own substantial AI initiatives.

feed.title: VICI Properties Inc. $VICI Shares Purchased by Skandinaviska Enskilda Banken AB publ
feed.summary: Skandinaviska Enskilda Banken AB publ increased its holdings in VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE:VICI) by 25.8% in Q3, now owning 995,021 shares worth over $32 million. VICI Properties, a REIT specializing in experiential real estate, recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.45 per share, yielding 6.0%. Despite some analysts trimming price targets, the stock maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $33.85.

feed.title: Skandinaviska Enskilda Banken AB publ Sells 76,266 Shares of Simon Property Group, Inc. $SPG
feed.summary: Skandinaviska Enskilda Banken AB publ reduced its stake in Simon Property Group, Inc. by 33.6%, selling 76,266 shares and retaining 150,691 shares valued at $28.28 million. Simon Property Group reported strong quarterly results, beating EPS and revenue expectations, and authorized a $2.0 billion share buyback program while declaring a quarterly dividend of $2.20 per share. Institutional ownership of Simon Property Group remains high at 93.01%, with various analysts maintaining a consensus "Hold" rating and a target price of $197.93 for the stock.

feed.title: Skandinaviska Enskilda Banken AB publ Has $23.55 Million Stock Holdings in ResMed Inc. $RMD
feed.summary: Skandinaviska Enskilda Banken AB publ recently reduced its stake in ResMed Inc. by 36.6%, selling 49,690 shares but still maintaining holdings worth $23.55 million. Meanwhile, ResMed exceeded quarterly earnings expectations with strong revenue growth and declared a $0.60 quarterly dividend. The company also saw significant insider selling, including shares sold by its CEO, despite analysts maintaining a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating.

feed.title: Rollins: High-Quality Business, But Still A Tough Entry Point Despite The Recent Drop
feed.summary: Rollins (ROL) is considered a Hold due to its premium valuation and sensitivity to earnings misses, despite strong growth and financials in 2025. The company delivered double-digit revenue, EPS, and FCF growth, but a slight miss led to a 15% stock drop. For 2026, Rollins expects 7-8% organic and 2-3% M&A-driven revenue growth, with opportunities in the fragmented pest control market.

feed.title: Equity Residential $EQR Shares Bought by Vanguard Group Inc.
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. increased its stake in Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) by 2.3% during the third quarter, acquiring an additional 1,281,354 shares to hold a total of 57,597,658 shares, now representing 15.14% of the company. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their positions in the real estate investment trust, with hedge funds and institutional investors collectively owning 92.68% of the stock. Equity Residential reported Q4 earnings that missed analyst estimates for EPS and revenue, but provided Q1 and FY2026 guidance, while analysts maintain a "Hold" rating with a consensus price target of $69.78.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Raises Stock Holdings in Targa Resources, Inc. $TRGP
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. increased its stake in Targa Resources, Inc. (NYSE:TRGP) by 1.5% in the third quarter, bringing its total ownership to 13.19% valued at approximately $4.76 billion. Analysts generally rate TRGP as a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $213.50. Despite paying a quarterly dividend, Targa Resources maintains a high debt-to-equity ratio of 5.91.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Raises Stake in Kenvue Inc. $KVUE
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. significantly increased its stake in Kenvue Inc. by acquiring an additional 101,177 shares, bringing its total ownership to 233,347,444 shares, valued at approximately $3.79 billion. Concurrently, Kenvue Director Jeffrey C. Smith purchased 3.2 million shares, increasing his personal holdings, while the company reported better-than-expected Q4 earnings with $3.78 billion in revenue and $0.27 EPS, declared a quarterly dividend, and announced workforce reductions. Despite the positive earnings, analysts hold a consensus "Hold" rating with an average price target of $19.46, and the company plans restructuring ahead of a proposed deal with Kimberly-Clark.

feed.title: Piper Sandler Adjusts Price Target on Quest Diagnostics to $215 From $200, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Piper Sandler has increased its price target for Quest Diagnostics (DGX) to $215 from $200, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a moderated outlook for the company's valuation by the firm. The article also provides a brief overview of recent insider transactions and other analyst ratings for Quest Diagnostics.

feed.title: AEP Rose 8% This Week. Here’s How Much the Stock Could Rise in 2026
feed.summary: American Electric Power (AEP) stock increased by 8% this week, closing near $130 per share, following strong fourth-quarter results and reaffirmed 2026 guidance. The company reported better-than-expected Q4 and full-year 2025 operating EPS, and significantly increased contracted load additions, primarily driven by data center demand. A valuation model suggests a target price of $150 for AEP, implying a 16% upside over three years due to its regulated growth profile and steady rate base expansion.

feed.title: IRDM: Morgan Stanley Raises Price Target for Iridium Communicati
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has raised its price target for Iridium Communications (IRDM) from $24.00 to $26.00, while maintaining an Equal-Weight rating. This adjustment comes amidst varying analyst ratings, with other firms like BWS Financial and Barclays also having recently updated their outlooks on the stock. Despite the new price target, the average analyst target price of $28.11 still suggests nearly 20% upside from the current trading price.

feed.title: Analog Devices surges after Q1 results and outlook beat estimates
feed.summary: Analog Devices (ADI) shares rose approximately 9% in premarket trading after reporting fiscal first-quarter results and providing an outlook that surpassed estimates. The company's revenue for Q1 fiscal 2026 increased by about 30% year-over-year to $3.16 billion, and its adjusted EPS also saw a significant rise.

feed.title: Analog Devices Posts Strong Q1 Results, Hikes Dividend
feed.summary: Analog Devices reported robust fiscal first-quarter 2026 results, with revenue increasing 30% year-on-year to $3.16 billion and a significant improvement in profitability, including a 51% boost in adjusted EPS. In recognition of strong performance and future confidence, the company's board raised the quarterly dividend by 11% to $1.10 per share, marking its 22nd consecutive annual increase. Analog Devices continues to show strong execution and market positioning, driven by industrial and communications demand, and record orders in its data center segment.

feed.title: Insulet Posts Strong Q4 Results, Expands Share Repurchase Program
feed.summary: Insulet reported strong Q4 and full-year 2025 results, with approximately 31% revenue growth driven by its Omnipod franchise and expanding margins. The company's board approved a $350 million increase to its share repurchase authorization, bringing the total to $475 million, with plans for significant buybacks in Q1 2026. This move, along with optimistic 2026 guidance, signals financial strength and confidence in Insulet's long-term growth and competitive position in automated insulin delivery.

feed.title: Philip Morris Reaffirms 2026 EPS Outlook and Growth
feed.summary: Philip Morris International (PM) has reaffirmed its 2026 full-year diluted EPS forecast, projecting growth between 11.1% and 13.1% compared to 2025. The company's executives presented their strategy and focus on smoke-free products at the CAGNY investor conference, emphasizing shareholder value and leadership in next-generation nicotine products. Despite potential risks, a recent analyst rating on PM stock is a Buy with a $210.00 price target, and TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, also rates PM as Outperform due to strong profitability and cash generation.

feed.title: PTC Inc (NASDAQ:PTC): A Strong Growth Stock with a Bullish Technical Setup
feed.summary: PTC Inc. (NASDAQ: PTC) is highlighted as a strong growth stock with a bullish technical setup, combining robust fundamental strength with an encouraging chart pattern. The company exhibits high profitability and financial soundness, with strong margins and efficient capital use. Despite a low overall technical score, a particular "setup rating" of 7/10 suggests potential for an upward move after a period of price consolidation, making it a compelling candidate for further study based on its growth prospects and fair valuation.

feed.title: Garmin announces fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025 results
feed.summary: Garmin Ltd. (NYSE: GRMN) announced record fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025 results, with consolidated revenue reaching $2.12 billion in Q4 and $7.25 billion for the full year, representing 17% and 15% increases, respectively. All segments achieved record full-year revenue, and the company reported strong operating income and EPS growth. Garmin also proposes a 17% dividend increase and initiated a new $500 million share repurchase program.

feed.title: General Mills wipes out prospects for growth amid “challenging backdrop”
feed.summary: General Mills has lowered its fiscal 2026 organic sales forecast, now expecting a decline of 1.5% to 2%, citing a "challenging backdrop" and slower-than-anticipated volume recovery. The company also revised down its adjusted operating profit and diluted EPS expectations. Despite the short-term headwinds, General Mills plans to leverage innovation in health and wellness, AI, and digital integration to drive future growth, expecting a 25% increase in net sales from new products in fiscal 2026.

feed.title: AI, new laws and rising costs are overwhelming in-house lawyers, report finds
feed.summary: A new report by FTI Consulting and Relativity reveals that in-house legal departments are grappling with unprecedented complexity, unpredictability, and rising costs due to accelerating risks, increased work volumes, and regulatory activity. While 39% of legal teams are adopting AI, new regulations and data breaches are primary drivers of increased workloads and dispute costs. The report highlights general counsels' efforts to balance risk mitigation with innovation amidst these growing pressures.

feed.title: BofA Securities resumes Kenvue stock coverage with no rating
feed.summary: BofA Securities has resumed coverage of Kenvue Inc (NYSE:KVUE) with no rating, citing the company's pending acquisition by Kimberly-Clark. Despite reporting fourth-quarter organic sales growth and impressive gross profit margins, Kenvue's stock is not trading on fundamentals due to the impending acquisition. The consumer health company, valued at $35.27 billion, operates with moderate debt and offers a 4.51% dividend yield.

feed.title: Barclays Adjusts Price Target on Incyte to $117 From $116, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Barclays has increased its price target for Incyte Corporation (NASDAQ: INCY) shares to $117 from the previous $116. The financial institution also decided to maintain an "Overweight" rating on the biopharmaceutical company's stock, reflecting continued confidence in its performance. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst revisions for Incyte, indicating ongoing evaluation of the company's financial outlook and product pipeline.

feed.title: Granite Construction Inc agrees to exchange $100 million of 3.75% convertible notes
feed.summary: Granite Construction Inc. has agreed to exchange $100 million of its 3.75% convertible notes. The construction and construction materials company operates through segments including Construction and Materials, focusing on infrastructure, roads, bridges, and materials production. The company's stock, GVA, closed at $128.61 on February 17, 2026, with an average analyst target price of $153.60.

feed.title: Moody's Corp. (MCO) Tops Q4 EPS by 23c
feed.summary: Moody's Corp. (MCO) announced its Q4 earnings, reporting an EPS of $3.64, which surpassed analyst estimates of $3.41 by $0.23. The company's revenue for the quarter reached $1.89 billion, also exceeding the consensus estimate of $1.86 billion.

feed.title: How Investors May Respond To Gartner (IT) AI Governance Pivot Amid Mixed Wall Street Views
feed.summary: Gartner (IT) is shifting its focus towards AI governance and cybersecurity amidst rising regulatory complexity, a move that could reshape its investment narrative. While some investors see this as a catalyst for increased demand, others worry that cheaper AI tools might pressure Gartner's premium subscriptions. The company's recent earnings and varying analyst ratings reflect ongoing debate about the impact of AI disruption on its business model.

feed.title: Grand Opening for New Cedar Rapids Ulta Store Set For This Weekend
feed.summary: A new Ulta Beauty store has opened in the Westdale Town Center in Cedar Rapids and will host its official grand opening celebration this weekend, from Friday, February 20th through Sunday, February 22nd. During the grand opening, customers can enjoy a 20% discount on qualifying in-store purchases without needing a coupon. The new location offers hair services, a Benefit BrowBar, The Wellness Shop, and is located at 3915 Westdale Parkway SW.

feed.title: Microchip Technology Surges 45% as PCIe Gen 6 Wins Stack Up: Here’s the Path to $134
feed.summary: Microchip Technology (MCHP) has shown strong recovery, with Q3 FY26 net sales up 16% year-over-year and EPS beating consensus, signaling the end of an inventory correction. The company's $800 million convertible note offering and three PCIe Gen 6 design wins, including one projected to generate over $100 million in 2027 revenue, are key drivers for future growth. Analysts project a potential 41% total return to a $111 target over two years, with a path to $134 under specific favorable conditions.

feed.title: Global Payments Posts Strong Q4 Results, Raises 2026 Outlook
feed.summary: Global Payments (GPN) reported strong fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results, with adjusted revenue of $2.32 billion and adjusted EPS up 11%. The company completed the acquisition of Worldpay and the divestiture of its Issuer Solutions business, transforming into a pure-play merchant solutions provider, and authorized a significant share repurchase program. Global Payments also provided a positive outlook for 2026, forecasting 13%-15% adjusted EPS growth.

feed.title: Amazon Abandons Blue Jay Warehouse Robot In Less Than Six Months, Pivots To New Technologies: Report
feed.summary: Amazon has ceased operations of its Blue Jay warehouse robot, less than six months after its introduction, reassigning staff to other robotics projects. The decision was due to high costs, manufacturing complexity, and implementation issues, but Amazon plans to incorporate parts of Blue Jay's technology into new systems like "Flex Cell." This move aligns with Amazon's transition to a more modular warehouse system called "Orbital" and comes as analysts predict significant cost savings from Amazon's advanced robotics in the future.

feed.title: MetLife Settles Pension Math Class Action, Heading Off Trial
feed.summary: Metropolitan Life Insurance Co. has reached a settlement in a class-action lawsuit challenging its pension calculations for retirees. The agreement was made just one day before the trial was set to begin, avoiding a courtroom battle. This case is part of a larger trend of lawsuits scrutinizing how large employers use actuarial and interest rate assumptions for pension formats.

feed.title: DTE Energy outlines 6%–8% EPS growth through 2030 as data center contracts expand capital plan by $6.5B
feed.summary: DTE Energy announced its financial targets, forecasting an adjusted EPS growth of 6% to 8% through 2030, with a long-term target of 5% to 7% beyond that. The company also revealed a $6.5 billion expansion to its capital investment plan, bringing the total to $44 billion over five years, primarily driven by new data center contracts and growing energy demand. This significant investment is expected to support the company's earnings growth and grid modernization efforts.

feed.title: Stephens Adjusts Price Target on Builders FirstSource to $125 From $137, Maintains Equalweight Rating
feed.summary: Stephens has lowered its price target for Builders FirstSource (BLDR) to $125 from $137, while keeping an Equalweight rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst a series of analyst revisions following recent financial reports for the company, including Q4 adjusted earnings and sales, and a revised earning outlook for 2026.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (ADI) Analog Devices, Inc. Reports Q1 Revenue $3.16B, vs. FactSet Est of $3.12B
feed.summary: Analog Devices, Inc. (ADI) reported first-quarter revenue of $3.16 billion, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $3.12 billion. The company also announced Q1 adjusted EPS of $2.46 per share, which exceeded the FactSet estimate of $2.41. Additionally, Analog Devices raised its quarterly dividend by 11%.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Grows Stock Position in Altria Group, Inc. $MO
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. increased its stake in Altria Group, Inc. by 7.2% during the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to over 12 million shares worth approximately $797.59 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in Altria, which recently reported an earnings per share of $1.30, slightly missing analyst estimates, and announced a new $2.00 billion stock repurchase program. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $1.06 per share, and analysts currently maintain a "Hold" consensus rating with a target price of $63.67.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Has $645.83 Million Stake in Leidos Holdings, Inc. $LDOS
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. reduced its stake in Leidos Holdings, Inc. by 3.1% in Q3, now holding 3,417,810 shares valued at $645.83 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions, with 76.12% of the stock owned by institutions. Leidos recently reported strong Q4 results, topping EPS estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend, despite a revenue miss attributed to a government shutdown.

feed.title: Fifth Third Bancorp Purchases 4,794 Shares of Spotify Technology $SPOT
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp significantly increased its stake in Spotify Technology by 447.2%, adding 4,794 shares to its portfolio, bringing its total to 5,866 shares valued at approximately $4.09 million. This increase follows Spotify's strong Q3 earnings, which surpassed analyst expectations with an EPS of $5.16 and revenue of $5.32 billion. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for Spotify, with an average price target of $706.42.

feed.title: Zacks Research Has Negative Outlook for ARE Q1 Earnings
feed.summary: Zacks Research has lowered its Q1 2026 EPS estimate for Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) to $1.74, maintaining a "Hold" rating, and projecting a full-year 2026 EPS of $6.39. This follows ARE's last reported quarterly EPS of $2.16, which beat estimates, despite a 4.4% year-over-year revenue decline. The company has also authorized a $500 million share buyback and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.72.

feed.title: Vulcan Materials Stock Outlook: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish?
feed.summary: Vulcan Materials Company (VMC) has underperformed the S&P 500 over the past year, gaining 11.7% compared to the S&P 500's 11.9%. The company's Q4 2025 results and 2026 guidance were weaker than expected, causing a 5.5% stock drop. Despite this, analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for VMC, with an average price target that suggests a 9.5% premium to its current levels.

feed.title: Verisk (Nasdaq: VRSK) 2025 revenue grows while cash flow surges
feed.summary: Verisk (Nasdaq: VRSK) announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2025, reporting revenue of $3.07 billion for the full year, a 6.6% increase. While GAAP net income saw a slight decline due to non-recurring gains in the prior year, adjusted EBITDA increased by 9.6% to $1.72 billion and diluted adjusted EPS rose by 7.8% to $7.16. The company also demonstrated strong cash generation, with operating cash flow up 25.5% and free cash flow up 29.5%, leading to an 11% increase in its quarterly dividend and a boosted share repurchase authorization of $2.5 billion.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (PODD) Insulet Corporation Reports Q4 Revenue $783.8M, vs. FactSet Est of $769.0M
feed.summary: Insulet Corporation (PODD) has reported its Q4 revenue, reaching $783.8 million, surpassing FactSet's estimated $769.0 million. Additionally, the company announced Q4 adjusted EPS of $1.55 per share, exceeding FactSet's estimate of $1.46 per share. This financial performance indicates stronger-than-expected results for the medical device company.

feed.title: PNC Financial Services Group Inc. Sells 9,637 Shares of Aercap Holdings N.V. $AER
feed.summary: PNC Financial Services Group Inc. reduced its stake in Aercap Holdings N.V. by 6.3% in the third quarter, selling 9,637 shares and now owning 142,533 shares valued at $17.25 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in the stock. Aercap recently announced a quarterly dividend increase to $0.40 per share and reported strong earnings, beating analyst expectations with $3.95 EPS on $2.24 billion revenue.

feed.title: Eyepoint Pharmaceuticals appoints Campbell to boost product launches
feed.summary: Eyepoint Pharmaceuticals has appointed Michael Campbell as Chief Commercial Officer (CCO) to enhance its product offerings and market presence. Campbell brings over 30 years of commercial leadership experience and a strong background in successful product launches. His role will be crucial in the company's aim to deliver the first sustained-release TKI to patients.

feed.title: Fifth Third Bancorp Sells 4,675 Shares of Hershey Company (The) $HSY
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp recently reduced its stake in Hershey Company by selling 4,675 shares, lowering its holdings to 40,548 shares valued at $7.585 million. Other institutional investors like SJS Investment Consulting and Vermillion & White Wealth Management Group also adjusted their positions, while corporate insiders CEO Kirk Tanner and CFO Steven E. Voskuil engaged in buying and selling activity, respectively. Analysts have a "Hold" consensus rating on Hershey, with recent price target adjustments and a declared quarterly dividend increase.

feed.title: Shell Asset Management Co. Sells 14,542 Shares of Corteva, Inc. $CTVA
feed.summary: Shell Asset Management Co. reduced its stake in Corteva, Inc. by 64.3% in the third quarter, selling 14,542 shares and retaining 8,058 shares worth $545,000. Despite this, other institutional investors like Vanguard Group Inc. and Geode Capital Management LLC increased their holdings. Corteva recently reported earnings of $0.22 per share, matching consensus, but revenue of $3.91 billion missed analyst estimates, and the company announced a quarterly dividend of $0.18 per share.

feed.title: Cummins Inc. $CMI Shares Sold by Shell Asset Management Co.
feed.summary: Shell Asset Management Co. significantly reduced its stake in Cummins Inc. by 88.2% in the third quarter, selling 4,860 shares valued at $274,000. Despite this, other major institutional investors like Vanguard Group Inc., State Street Corp, and Fisher Asset Management LLC increased their holdings in Cummins during the second quarter. The article also notes recent insider sales by Brett Michael Merritt and William I. Miller, and several analysts have recently raised their price targets for CMI, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating.

feed.title: Moody's Assigns Octobank B3 Rating with Stable Outlook
feed.summary: Moody's Investors Service has assigned Octobank a B3 long-term rating with a Stable outlook, reflecting the bank's credit profile within Uzbekistan's operating environment. A B3 rating indicates elevated credit risk but suggests the institution can meet financial obligations under current conditions. The Stable outlook indicates that Moody's expects Octobank's credit fundamentals to remain consistent over the next 12-18 months, with no anticipated changes in the rating.
